## Features

- Expanded the light theme set from 8 to 16 themes while keeping the existing 8 dark themes.
- Organized the theme picker into 8 colorway rows so each row contains the matching dark theme, light-theme-with-light-panel variant, and light-theme-with-dark-panel variant.
- Added new light themes for the missing light-panel and dark-panel colorway variants: Glacier, Ivory, Apricot, Lilac, Canopy, Ledger, Terracotta, and Lagoon.
- Kept follow-system theme selection active while allowing the current system family to choose from all valid variants; light system mode can choose either light-panel or dark-panel light themes.

## Bug Fixes

- Adjusted the theme colorway data so each row now shares the same visual color family instead of only sharing metadata.
- Removed the table-style header from the theme picker so the dialog shows only colorway rows and theme buttons.
- Aligned Neutral and Warm colorway accents and swatches across their dark, light-panel, and dark-panel variants.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Updated `package.json` and `package-lock.json` to version `1.2.9`.
- Updated the multi-theme requirements document to describe the 16 light themes, 8 light-panel variants, 8 dark-panel variants, colorway row layout, and headerless picker.
- Added unit coverage for complete colorway rows and same-family accent consistency.
- Updated shell and E2E coverage for the headerless theme picker layout.

## Verification

- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`

## Artifacts

- macOS Apple Silicon: `MDE-1.2.9-mac-arm64.dmg`, `MDE-1.2.9-mac-arm64.zip`
- macOS Intel: `MDE-1.2.9-mac-x64.dmg`, `MDE-1.2.9-mac-x64.zip`
- Windows x64: `MDE-1.2.9-win-x64.exe`, `MDE-1.2.9-win-x64.exe.blockmap`, `latest.yml`
